Eligibility

Entity Type

Can Apply for Cards

PH Individual (Social Sellers)

❌

PH Sole Proprietor

✅

PH Partnership

✅

PH Corporation

✅

Foreign Entity

❌

Merchant Requirements

Category

Requirement

BDD (Proof of Business)

Social Media

  • Allowed, but must be verified and active

Website

  • Must be fully functioning

  • Must include complete legal policies (e.g., Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions)

  • Must clearly show the payment flow

Applications

  • Must be published on the App Store and Google Play

  • Must include a clear and working payment flow

UBP Cards Match Template

  • Middle Names of the shareholders

  • Date of Birth of the shareholders

Activation SLA

  • UBP - 10 working days.

  • Maya - 1-3 working days*

Card activation may be delayed or put on hold if the required MCC is not available.

For MAYA, activation will be put on hold while we request their assistance to enroll and configure the necessary MID for the missing MCC.

For UBP, activation will also be delayed if it is not approved by UBP and the MCC is not available with MAYA, as we will follow the same process of requesting MID creation and configuration.

General PH Cards Activation Step

No.

Category

Process

Owner

1.

Merchant click activate from merchant’s dashboard https://dashboard.xendit.co/login and Merchant fill information in customer dashboard

Once merchant activate their dashboard they will informed the SLA of the Cards activation

This request will go to Channel Activation: PH CARDS

Merchant

2

MO agent to check request and process in Channel Activation: PH CARDS

Check if selected MCC is to be routed under MAYA or UBP. Please refer to this MCC list routing rule Partner Acquirer MCC Comparison

MAYA

  • Only PH Acceptance

  • Recurring

  • If MCC not available in list, route to UBP and log merchant details and MCC here: MO Cards Tracker Dec 2025

UBP

  • Accept PH and USD

  • Not allowed for recurring

MO

Acquirer: MAYA

No

Steps

Owner

1

Once the application has been submitted, the MO agent must check the request under Channel Activation for PH Cards.


MO Agent must check the following:

  • The website submitted by the merchant, if applicable for Cards.

    • The website should not be a social media site.

    • The website must be fully functional, with complete details including: Payment Flow, Terms and Conditions (T&C), Refund Policy, and Privacy Policy.

  • If the merchant requested recurring payments, MO agent must check whether the business is allowed to use the recurring function. If not, return it to the merchant via self-serve email to request clarification regarding the recurring payment request.

  • If the merchant wants to accept USD, note that this is not yet available for MAYA. USD acceptance should be processed under UBP. However, PH acceptance can still be activated under MAYA as long as the MCC is available under MAYA.

  • If invalid, return it for resubmission via self-serve email. PH Email Tracker Product Application (self serve)

  • If everything is in order, the MO may activate Cards via Channel Activation.


Click confirm

MO

2

Configure transaction limits based on the limits set by Risk here

Go to Customer Details > Transactions Limit > Periodic Transaction Limits > Credit Card > Set Monthly Transaction Limit > Save



By default, foreign card acceptance should be turned OFF. Go to Customer Details > Rules > Block > Add Rules



MO

Acquirer: UBP

No

Steps

Owner

1

Once the application has been submitted, the MO agent must check the request under Channel Activation for PH Cards.


MO Agent must check the following:

  • The website submitted by the merchant, if applicable for Cards.

    • The website should not be a social media site.

    • The website must be fully functional, with complete details including: Payment Flow, Terms and Conditions (T&C), Refund Policy, and Privacy Policy.

  • If the merchant wants to accept USD, please check if necessary fro the merchant’s business

  • If invalid, return it for resubmission via self-serve email. PH Email Tracker Product Application (self serve)

  • If MCC is available here

  • If everything is in order, the MO may activate Cards via Channel Activation.

MO

2

Before downloading the match template for UBP, ensure that the merchant has the following information:

  • Middle names of incorporators/shareholders

  • Dates of birth

For Sole Proprietors, this information is usually available on their primary IDs. If the information is complete, you may proceed to the next step.

For Corporations, you need to reach out to the merchant to request the middle names of all incorporators/shareholders and the dates of birth of all shareholders.

3

Proceed with downloading the excel sheet

Choose range date (not max 5 days)

MO

3

Make a copy of the Sample_Match_Template and move it to the latest created folder, make sure to rename it to the latest version, in this example, it will be “Match_Xendit_YYYYMMDD”:

Match_Xendit_20231016.xlsx

4

Copy the information from the downloaded Excel sheet onto the Match_Template, please note that the following will need to be input or checked manually still:

  • For the legal name, make sure that the merchant name indicated is consistent with the name on the registration papers.

  • At column B, make sure to input the merchant’s legal business name registered on their DTI / SEC Certificate of Registration

    • E.g. Xendit’s legal business is Xendit Philippines Inc

  • At column E: Input the business type

  • At column H, “MID”: Use this list as a guide:

    • MID 1 - PHP format in sheet: 1(007250000003107)

    • MID 3 - PHP format in sheet: 3(007250000004437)

    • MID 4 - PHP format in sheet: 4(007250000004455)

    • MID 5 - PHP format in sheet: 5(007250000004473)

    • MID 6 - USD only format in sheet: 6(007250000003198)

How to choose which MID?

  • After checking with the merchant’s tab on PH Cards, if they answered “yes” to just accepting USD, then:

    • MID: xx (PHP MID)/6(007250000003198)

  • After checking with the merchant’s tab on PH Cards, if they answered “yes” to both recurring and USD, then:

    • Only submit USD PHP to UBP 6(007250000003198) and upon activation, add Maya PHP MID

    • Recurring transactions can only be processed via Maya MID

  • In column Q, “Submerchant Name”: Input XDT*Trading Name of the merchant

  • In column R, “Submerchant ID”: It is the last 15 digits of our merchant’s BID:

    • Example: Original BID is 6231cfae8a0db51afaab869f

    • Submerchant ID in Match Template will be: 6231cfae8a0db51afaab869f

  • Use the DTI (For sole prop) or GIS (For Corporations) to add the incorporator details in the template.

    • Make sure to include the middle names and DOBs that were given by sales into the template.

    • % Ownership of sole prop is 100%

    • For corporations, it depends on the GIS (input shareholders that are more than 20%).

5

Submission to partner (UBP)

  • Download the match template that was created and the IDs and SAs that were uploaded.

  • Prepare and email to be sent to the following recipients:

To:

smgpamarang@unionbankph.com, dmepallasigui@unionbankph.com,

pcguadalupe@unionbankph.com,

jtbutial@unionbankph.com

Cc:

sales@xendit.ph,

Marnelli Santos <aleli@xendit.co>,

Khim Bautista <khim@xendit.co>,

Sophia Publico <sophia@xendit.co>,

PH Merchant Ops <merchantops@xendit.ph>

Subject Line: Batch #(number from tracker) Xendit Submerchants Onboarding

Body:

Hi UBP Team,

Good day! :)

MMDDYY Xendit PH Merchant Batch #(number from tracker)

1 Merchant 1

2 Merchant 2

N Merchant n

Document is encrypted with a password

Please acknowledge the receipt of this email.

Thank you!

Attach the Match template that secured with password:

Before we submit to partner, make sure the excel sheet protected with password

Format for password is : Xendit@DDMMYY

Send email to UBP as example attached, along with attachment (excel sheet, zip document for each merchant)

6

Update the Adverse Findings Tracker [Restricted] and indicate the batch number.

7

Partner will give us feedback by email and inform MO whether merchants is passed or need EDD, as inform attached

UBP will reply to the email with feedback on the merchant:

  • If there is no adverse finding, proceed to activation.

    • Go to the adverse findings tracker

    • Copy the BID from the tracker

    • Find the merchant in the PH Cards dashboard

      • If UBP suggested a MCC on the email, please use the suggested MCC

    • Press “Activate”

    • Reflect this in the tracker as well

    • And continue proceed with steps 8a - finished below

  • If there is an adverse finding

    • Go to the adverse findings tracker

    • Tick the box under “Adverse Findings” column

    • Provide initial feedback to MRisk in Slack thread

    • Wait for final disposition from MRisk regarding this merchant if MO can go ahead to activate with Maya or decline

8

Configure transaction limits based on the limits set by Risk here

Go to Customer Details > Transactions Limit > Periodic Transaction Limits > Credit Card > Set Monthly Transaction Limit > Save


By default, foreign card acceptance should be turned OFF. Go to Customer Details > Rules > Block > Add Rules


MO

UPB MID List

MID

MID Label

Description

1(007250000003107)

XENDIT_UBP_PHP

2(007250000004419)

XENDIT_UBP_007250000004419

MID not yet registered

3(007250000004437)

XENDIT_UBP_PHP_3

4(007250000004455)

XENDIT_UBP_PHP_4

5(007250000004473)

XENDIT_UBP_PHP_5

6(007250000003198)

UBP_CTV_ECOMM_USD_5999

USD

Edge Cases

Adding UBP USD MID

If activation was done via the channel approval tab in OM, it should be automated. But if it was done manually via Retool, MO needs to manually configure/add USD in Retool: Go to Retool > Merchant > Search BID > Scroll to USD, and add the following configuration, Click Next > Submit


Adding Recurring MID

  • For MAYA MID, if recurring was initially set to Yes during activation, it is already enabled. Ensure that “Allow Merchant-Initiated Transactions” is also enabled.

XP-Owned Cards Activation

For XP-Owned merchants in PH, they will get cards toggle activated automatically if their Master Account got activated.

Enstack XP Owned Additional Steps

No

Category

Steps

Owner

1

AA

Enstack merchants will be requesting account activation thru their AM/SR or from Slack channel #ext-enstack-xendit-integration

SR/AM

2

AA

MO will proceed KYC for Enstack merchants in this tracker (MO Only) Shopboxo & Enstack Sub-merchants KYC [Restricted]

MO

3

Cards Activation

Once KYC is passed, MO to check if industry of merchant is available here proceed with card activation via Retool.

For MAYA


If MCC is not available in MAYA, follow the steps below:

New MID Creation

  • MO validates industries/MCCs during account activation, so merchants are no longer assigned to generic MCCs/industries at the merchant level.

  • If a merchant requests card activation but there is no existing MID for the required MCC, MO should raise a request to Partnerships to create a new MID here

  • Merchants will be put on hold while waiting for the new MID.

  • MO will regularly update the tracker for merchants with MCCs that don’t have an MID and share updates so you can request the new MIDs from partners.


For UBP

4

Configure transaction limits based on the limits set by Risk here

Go to Customer Details > Transactions Limit > Periodic Transaction Limits > Credit Card > Set Monthly Transaction Limit > Save


By default, foreign card acceptance should be turned OFF. Go to Customer Details > Rules > Block > Add Rules


MO

5

Once cards is activated, please do not forget to update column G - Cards Status.

If there were instances where Cards is rejected, please kindly update the status in column G as well and inform Charnie in #ext-enstack-xendit-integration

Individual Sellers (XP Owned Sub-Account)

  • AM/SR raised the request to #cc-settings-request for Mrisk’s approval

  • Once approved, Mrisk will enable cards and set rules/limits for merchants

  • MO will proceed to add Maya MID for merchants BAU

XP-Managed Cards Activation

  • Process will be same as CA BAU

    Change of Legal Name and Entity Type

Once the application has been submitted, the MO agent must check the request under Channel Activation for PH Cards.


MO Agent must check the following:

  • The website submitted by the merchant, if applicable for Cards.
    • The website should not be a social media site.

UBP Cards onboarding

1

Once the application has been submitted, the MO agent must check the request under Channel Activation for PH Cards.


MO Agent must check the following:

  • The website submitted by the merchant, if applicable for Cards.
    • The website should not be a social media site.

MO

2

Before downloading the match template for UBP, make sure that the merchant has the following information:

  • Middle names of incorporators/shareholders
  • Date of Birth

If the merchant is sole prop, this information can normally be found on their primary IDs. If you can find this information, please proceed to the next step.

3

Proceed with downloading the excel sheet

Choose range date (not max 5 days)

MO

Make a copy of the sample match template.

3

Make a copy of the Sample_Match_Template and move it to the latest created folder, make sure to rename it to the latest version, in this example, it will be “Match_Xendit_20220407”:

Match_Xendit_20231016.xlsx

Filling in submission form

4a

For UBP’s MCC: Open the Visa MCCs folder on a separate tab for reference.

If there is MCC code indicated in the dashboard, cross check that with the Visa MCC doc:

To make sure they’re correct, cross check with the business description, in this case, this merchant is selling medicine and therefore:

If the merchant indicates “N/A” on the MCC code, do the same step as above.

4b

Copy the information from the downloaded Excel sheet onto the Match_Template, please note that the following will need to be input or checked manually still:

  • For the legal name, make sure that the merchant name indicated is consistent with the name on the registration papers.
  • At column B, make sure to input the merchant’s legal business name registered on their DTI / SEC Certificate of Registration
    • E.g. Xendit’s legal business is Xendit Philippines Inc
  • At column E: Input the business type
  • At column H, “MID”: Use this list as a guide:
    • MID 1 - PHP format in sheet: 1(007250000003107)
    • MID 3 - PHP format in sheet: 3(007250000004437)
    • MID 4 - PHP format in sheet: 4(007250000004455)
    • MID 5 - PHP format in sheet: 5(007250000004473)
    • MID 6 - USD only format in sheet: 6(007250000003198)

How to choose which MID?

  • After checking with the merchant’s tab on PH Cards, if they answered “yes” to just accepting USD, then:
    • MID: xx (PHP MID)/6(007250000003198)
  • After checking with the merchant’s tab on PH Cards, if they answered “yes” to both recurring and USD, then:
    • Only submit USD PHP to UBP 6(007250000003198) and upon activation, add Maya PHP MID
    • Recurring transactions can only be processed via Maya MID
  • In column Q, “Submerchant Name”: Input XDT*Trading Name of the merchant
  • In column R, “Submerchant ID”: It is the last 15 digits of our merchant’s BID:
    • Example: Original BID is 6231cfae8a0db51afaab869f
    • Submerchant ID in Match Template will be: 6231cfae8a0db51afaab869f
  • Use the DTI (For sole prop) or GIS (For Corporations) to add the incorporator details in the template.
    • Make sure to include the middle names and DOBs that were given by sales into the template.
    • % Ownership of sole prop is 100%
    • For corporations, it depends on the GIS (input shareholders that are more than 20%).

Subject Line: Batch #(number from tracker) Xendit Submerchants Onboarding

Body:

Hi UBP Team,

Good day! :)

MMDDYY Xendit PH Merchant Batch #(number from tracker)

1 Merchant 1

2 Merchant 2

N Merchant n

Document is encrypted with a password

Please acknowledge the receipt of this email.

Thank you!

Attach the Match template that secured with password:

Before we submit to partner, make sure the excel sheet protected with password

Format for password is : Xendit@DDMMYY

Send email to UBP as example attached, along with attachment (excel sheet, zip document for each merchant)

Update Adverse Findings Tracker

6

Update the Adverse Findings Tracker [Restricted] and indicate the batch number.

Feedbacks from UBP

7

Partner will give us feedback by email and inform MO whether merchants is passed or need EDD, as inform attached

UBP will reply to the email with feedback on the merchant:

  • If there is no adverse finding, proceed to activation.
    • Go to the adverse findings tracker
    • Copy the BID from the tracker
    • Find the merchant in the PH Cards dashboard
    • Press “Activate”
    • Reflect this in the tracker as well
    • And continue proceed with steps 8a - finished below
  • If there is an adverse finding
    • Go to the adverse findings tracker
    • Tick the box under “Adverse Findings” column
    • Provide initial feedback to MRisk in Slack thread
    • Wait for final disposition from MRisk regarding this merchant if MO can go ahead to activate with Maya or decline

8a

Adding UBP MID

(can refer to Onboarding PH MID Confluence)

Since submission to UBP will be for merchants requesting USD, please follow below steps for MID duplication (UBP):

  1. Make sure to add USD and PHP for merchant’s currency

  1. Make sure UBP MID (for USD) is available in the merchant's BID. And please proceed to add PHP MID as well
  2. Flow for adding USD MID:
    Under MID, click DUPLICATE and use the info below:

BID : DEFAULT_XDT

MID label : UBP_CTV_ECOMM_USD_5999

and then save

  1. Then proceed with adding PHP MID:
  • For PHP MID, MO should check assigned MCC
  • MO will compare the rates for UBP vs Maya based on Partner Acquirer MCC Comparison to check which acquirer has the lower MDR rates for PHP
  • If Maya has lower rate, then proceed with duplicating Maya MID as well to merchant’s BID (the step will be similar with Adding Maya MID) - see below pic as example

  • If UBP has lower rate, then proceed with duplicating UBP MID as well to merchant’s BID with below steps:
    Fill with corresponding UBP MID that falls into the category. i.e if merchant industry is school, then add MID 5 XENDIT_UBP_PHP_5 (ref: Partner Acquirer MCC Comparison - Sheet UBP)

9

Update MCC in CM Dashboard

Click the pencil button on the top right corner.

Open Customer Management (CM), copy the BID from PH Cards onto CM.

Go to Business Settings > Cards > MCC, and add the MCC that we UBP has approved., copy the postal code and paste it onto the “Postal code” field in the PH Cards dashboard.

UPB MID List

  • 5eb12ad2bf241713381571e6

MID

MID Label

Description

1(007250000003107)

XENDIT_UBP_PHP

2(007250000004419)

XENDIT_UBP_007250000004419

MID not yet registered

3(007250000004437)

XENDIT_UBP_PHP_3

4(007250000004455)

XENDIT_UBP_PHP_4

5(007250000004473)

XENDIT_UBP_PHP_5

6(007250000003198)

UBP_CTV_ECOMM_USD_5999

USD

Edge Cases

Adding USD and PHP Currency

To add USD and PHP as Currency: Confluence

  1. Go to Admin Dashboard
  2. Search by BID
  3. Go to Business Setting
  4. Scroll to Cards section
  5. Choose the environment that want to be assigned to
  6. Add USD directly by choose USD and click Add button

Adding UBP USD MID

NEW PROCESS: If activation was done via the channel approval tab in OM, it should be automated. But if it was done manually via Retool, MO needs to manually configure/add USD in Retool:

Go to Retool > Merchant

Search by BID

Scroll to USD, and add the following configuration:

Click Next > Submit



To add USD MID (Old Process)

  1. Go to Admin Dashboard > Customer Management
  2. Search by BID
  3. Go to Business Settings
  4. Scroll to Cards Section
  5. Choose the environment that want to be assigned to (LIVE/TEST)
  6. Under MID, click DUPLICATE and use the info below:

BID : DEFAULT_XDT

MID label : UBP_CTV_ECOMM_USD_5999

and then save

  1. Click Find MID and duplicate
  2. Click Save

Adding Recurring MID

  1. In case a merchant requested for recurring payments, MO needs to manually add in Active MID under Business Settings. For Maya MID, recurring is already enabled & make sure “Allow merchant initiated transactions” is enabled.

XP-Owned Cards Activation

For XP-Owned merchants in PH, they will get cards toggle activated automatically if their Master Account got activated. Therefore, for XP Owned Accounts that are required to be KYC-ed by MO, we shall toggle off their cards toggle first.

Enstack XP Owned Additional Steps

No

Category

Steps

owner

1

AA

Enstack merchants will be requesting account activation thru their AM/SR or from Slack channel #ext-enstack-xendit-integration

SR/AM

2

AA

MO will proceed KYC for Enstack merchants in this tracker (MO Only) Shopboxo & Enstack Sub-merchants KYC [Restricted]

MO

3

Cards Activation

During or after MO proceeds for Enstack, MO should request for Mrisk to review the application.

On the tracker, MO can tick-marked the column I (“i”) and this will trigger automate notifications to #cc-settings-request and change the Cards Status (column G to be Pending Approval)

4

Once requests went to #cc-settings-request, Mrisk will review BAU

Mrisk

5

Once we got approval from Mrisk, MO to proceed with Cards Activation BAU using Maya (local cards only for Enstack)

6

Once cards is activated, please do not forget to update column G - Cards Status.

If there were instances where Cards is rejected, please kindly update the status in column G as well and inform the Sales (Ryan Garcia)

Individual Sellers (XP Owned Sub-Account)

  1. AM/SR raised the request to #cc-settings-request for Mrisk’s approval
  2. Once approved, Mrisk will enable cards and set rules/limits for merchants
  3. MO will proceed to add Maya MID for merchants BAU

XP-Managed Cards Activation

DragonPay Sub-Account

  1. XP-Account DragonPay will apply for cards activation from their own Dashboard. Their application will go to our CA Dashboard BAU
  2. DP AM/SR will update their tracker [Ext] Dragonpay x Xendit Credit Card Acquiring Referrals - Merchant Tracker - Sheet Channel Fees
  3. MO shall raise the request to #cc-settings-request for Mrisk’s approval
  4. Once approved, Mrisk will enable cards and set rules/limits for merchants
  5. MO will proceed to add Maya MID for merchants BAU and updates DP tracker in the Sheet Cards Activation Status

PJ Lhuillier / Perapal / Cebuana Sub-Account

Cards Activation for merchants with Social Media Page

As of Jan 27 2023

According to Mrisk, we can proceed to proceed activating cards for sub-merchant under Cebuana / Perapal / PJ Lhuillier provided that they passed the following checklist:

a). Is socmed url accessible?

b). url shows products/services that are aligned with merchant’s application

c). url shows pricing in local currency

d). If merchant provides a clear payment flow they intend to do with our cards product (e.g: are they sending invoice links to buyers, are they integrating via API?, etc). For point d) we will need you to help us get this information from merchant.

Once all passed, MO will request for approval from Mrisk and they will setup parameters back end before MO will activate cards.

Pending:

Currently getting confirmation in public channel if this will be applied for all ID and PH merchants https://xendit.slack.com/archives/C01PHK0ML79/p1674807938038739 "

Slack Thread

Comparing Low Rates (PHP Only)

TBC

Escalation to UBP

If any merchant encounters an error on their first transaction using cards under UBP MID:

  • MO needs to ask the following information from CS/Cards team:
    • Trx date:
      MRN:
    • Trx amount:
    • Masked card no:
    • Merchant Descriptor:
  • MO to send an email to the UBP team to ask for the reason for error and how to resolve the issue.

UBP Cards Match Template

  • Middle Names of the shareholders
  • Date of Birth of the shareholders


Activation SLA

  • 10 working days.

PH Cards Activation Step

No.

Category

Process

Owner

1.

Merchant click activate from merchant’s dashboard https://dashboard.xendit.co/login and Merchant fill information in customer dashboard

Once merchant activate their dashboard they will informed the SLA of the Cards activation

This request will go to Channel Activation: PH CARDS

Merchant

2

MO agent to check request and process in Channel Activation: PH CARDS

Check if selected MCC is to be routed under MAYA or UBP. Please refer to this MCC list routing rule Partner Acquirer MCC Comparison

MAYA

  • Only PH Acceptance
  • Recurring
  • If MCC not available in list, route to UBP and log merchant details and MCC here: MO Cards Tracker Dec 2025

UBP

  • Accept PH and USD
  • Not allowed for recurring

MO

Acquirer: MAYA

Category

No

Steps

Owner

1

Once the application has been submitted, the MO agent must check the request under Channel Activation for PH Cards.


MO Agent must check the following:

  • The website submitted by the merchant, if applicable for Cards.
    • The website should not be a social media site.
    • The website must be fully functional, with complete details including: Payment Flow, Terms and Conditions (T&C), Refund Policy, and Privacy Policy.
  • If the merchant requested recurring payments, MO agent must check whether the business is allowed to use the recurring function. If not, return it to the merchant via self-serve email to request clarification regarding the recurring payment request.
  • If the merchant wants to accept USD, note that this is not yet available for MAYA. USD acceptance should be processed under UBP. However, PH acceptance can still be activated under MAYA as long as the MCC is available under MAYA.
  • If invalid, return it for resubmission via self-serve email. PH Email Tracker Product Application (self serve)
  • If everything is in order, the MO may activate Cards via Channel Activation.

Click confirm

MO

Acquirer: UBP

Category

No

Steps

owner

UBP Cards onboarding

1

Once the application has been submitted, the MO agent must check the request under Channel Activation for PH Cards.


MO Agent must check the following:

  • The website submitted by the merchant, if applicable for Cards.
    • The website should not be a social media site.
    • The website must be fully functional, with complete details including: Payment Flow, Terms and Conditions (T&C), Refund Policy, and Privacy Policy.
  • If the merchant wants to accept USD, please check if necessary fro the merchant’s business
  • If invalid, return it for resubmission via self-serve email. PH Email Tracker Product Application (self serve)
  • If MCC is available here
  • If everything is in order, the MO may activate Cards via Channel Activation.

MO

2

Before downloading the match template for UBP, make sure that the merchant has the following information:

  • Middle names of incorporators/shareholders
  • Date of Birth

If the merchant is sole prop, this information can normally be found on their primary IDs. If you can find this information, please proceed to the next step.

3

Proceed with downloading the excel sheet

Choose range date (not max 5 days)

MO

Make a copy of the sample match template.

3

Make a copy of the Sample_Match_Template and move it to the latest created folder, make sure to rename it to the latest version, in this example, it will be “Match_Xendit_20220407”:

Match_Xendit_20231016.xlsx

Filling in submission form

4a

For UBP’s MCC: Open the Visa MCCs folder on a separate tab for reference.

If there is MCC code indicated in the dashboard, cross check that with the Visa MCC doc:

To make sure they’re correct, cross check with the business description, in this case, this merchant is selling medicine and therefore:

If the merchant indicates “N/A” on the MCC code, do the same step as above.

4b

Copy the information from the downloaded Excel sheet onto the Match_Template, please note that the following will need to be input or checked manually still:

  • For the legal name, make sure that the merchant name indicated is consistent with the name on the registration papers.
  • At column B, make sure to input the merchant’s legal business name registered on their DTI / SEC Certificate of Registration
    • E.g. Xendit’s legal business is Xendit Philippines Inc
  • At column E: Input the business type
  • At column H, “MID”: Use this list as a guide:
    • MID 1 - PHP format in sheet: 1(007250000003107)
    • MID 3 - PHP format in sheet: 3(007250000004437)
    • MID 4 - PHP format in sheet: 4(007250000004455)
    • MID 5 - PHP format in sheet: 5(007250000004473)
    • MID 6 - USD only format in sheet: 6(007250000003198)

How to choose which MID?

  • After checking with the merchant’s tab on PH Cards, if they answered “yes” to just accepting USD, then:
    • MID: xx (PHP MID)/6(007250000003198)
  • After checking with the merchant’s tab on PH Cards, if they answered “yes” to both recurring and USD, then:
    • Only submit USD PHP to UBP 6(007250000003198) and upon activation, add Maya PHP MID
    • Recurring transactions can only be processed via Maya MID
  • In column Q, “Submerchant Name”: Input XDT*Trading Name of the merchant
  • In column R, “Submerchant ID”: It is the last 15 digits of our merchant’s BID:
    • Example: Original BID is 6231cfae8a0db51afaab869f
    • Submerchant ID in Match Template will be: 6231cfae8a0db51afaab869f
  • Use the DTI (For sole prop) or GIS (For Corporations) to add the incorporator details in the template.
    • Make sure to include the middle names and DOBs that were given by sales into the template.
    • % Ownership of sole prop is 100%
    • For corporations, it depends on the GIS (input shareholders that are more than 20%).

5

Submission to partner (UBP)

Download the match template that was created and the IDs and SAs that were uploaded.

Prepare and email to be sent to the following recipients:

To:

smgpamarang@unionbankph.com, dmepallasigui@unionbankph.com,

pcguadalupe@unionbankph.com,

jtbutial@unionbankph.com

Cc:

sales@xendit.ph,

Marnelli Santos <aleli@xendit.co>,

Khim Bautista <khim@xendit.co>,

Sophia Publico <sophia@xendit.co>,

PH Merchant Ops <merchantops@xendit.ph>

Subject Line: Batch #(number from tracker) Xendit Submerchants Onboarding

Body:

Hi UBP Team,

Good day! :)

MMDDYY Xendit PH Merchant Batch #(number from tracker)

1 Merchant 1

2 Merchant 2

N Merchant n

Document is encrypted with a password

Please acknowledge the receipt of this email.

Thank you!

Attach the Match template that secured with password:

Before we submit to partner, make sure the excel sheet protected with password

Format for password is : Xendit@DDMMYY

Send email to UBP as example attached, along with attachment (excel sheet, zip document for each merchant)

Update Adverse Findings Tracker

6

Update the Adverse Findings Tracker [Restricted] and indicate the batch number.

Feedbacks from UBP

7

Partner will give us feedback by email and inform MO whether merchants is passed or need EDD, as inform attached

UBP will reply to the email with feedback on the merchant:

  • If there is no adverse finding, proceed to activation.
    • Go to the adverse findings tracker
    • Copy the BID from the tracker
    • Find the merchant in the PH Cards dashboard
    • Press “Activate”
    • Reflect this in the tracker as well
    • And continue proceed with steps 8a - finished below
  • If there is an adverse finding
    • Go to the adverse findings tracker
    • Tick the box under “Adverse Findings” column
    • Provide initial feedback to MRisk in Slack thread
    • Wait for final disposition from MRisk regarding this merchant if MO can go ahead to activate with Maya or decline

8a

Adding UBP MID

(can refer to Onboarding PH MID Confluence)

Since submission to UBP will be for merchants requesting USD, please follow below steps for MID duplication (UBP):

  1. Make sure to add USD and PHP for merchant’s currency

  1. Make sure UBP MID (for USD) is available in the merchant's BID. And please proceed to add PHP MID as well
  2. Flow for adding USD MID:
    Under MID, click DUPLICATE and use the info below:

BID : DEFAULT_XDT

MID label : UBP_CTV_ECOMM_USD_5999

and then save

  1. Then proceed with adding PHP MID:
  • For PHP MID, MO should check assigned MCC
  • MO will compare the rates for UBP vs Maya based on Partner Acquirer MCC Comparison to check which acquirer has the lower MDR rates for PHP
  • If Maya has lower rate, then proceed with duplicating Maya MID as well to merchant’s BID (the step will be similar with Adding Maya MID) - see below pic as example

  • If UBP has lower rate, then proceed with duplicating UBP MID as well to merchant’s BID with below steps:
    Fill with corresponding UBP MID that falls into the category. i.e if merchant industry is school, then add MID 5 XENDIT_UBP_PHP_5 (ref: Partner Acquirer MCC Comparison - Sheet UBP)

9

Update MCC in CM Dashboard

Click the pencil button on the top right corner.

Open Customer Management (CM), copy the BID from PH Cards onto CM.

Go to Business Settings > Cards > MCC, and add the MCC that we UBP has approved., copy the postal code and paste it onto the “Postal code” field in the PH Cards dashboard.

UPB MID List

MID

MID Label

Description

1(007250000003107)

XENDIT_UBP_PHP

2(007250000004419)

XENDIT_UBP_007250000004419

MID not yet registered

3(007250000004437)

4(007250000004455)

XENDIT_UBP_PHP_4

5(007250000004473)

XENDIT_UBP_PHP_5

6(007250000003198)

UBP_CTV_ECOMM_USD_5999

USD

Edge Cases

Adding USD and PHP Currency

To add USD and PHP as Currency: Confluence

  1. Go to Admin Dashboard
  2. Search by BID
  3. Go to Business Setting
  4. Scroll to Cards section
  5. Choose the environment that want to be assigned to
  6. Add USD directly by choose USD and click Add button

Adding UBP USD MID

NEW PROCESS: If activation was done via the channel approval tab in OM, it should be automated. But if it was done manually via Retool, MO needs to manually configure/add USD in Retool:

Go to Retool > Merchant

Search by BID

Scroll to USD, and add the following configuration:

Click Next > Submit



To add USD MID (Old Process)

  1. Go to Admin Dashboard > Customer Management
  2. Search by BID
  3. Go to Business Settings
  4. Scroll to Cards Section
  5. Choose the environment that want to be assigned to (LIVE/TEST)
  6. Under MID, click DUPLICATE and use the info below:

BID : DEFAULT_XDT

MID label : UBP_CTV_ECOMM_USD_5999

and then save

  1. Click Find MID and duplicate
  2. Click Save

Adding Recurring MID

  1. In case a merchant requested for recurring payments, MO needs to manually add in Active MID under Business Settings. For Maya MID, recurring is already enabled & make sure “Allow merchant initiated transactions” is enabled.

XP-Owned Cards Activation

For XP-Owned merchants in PH, they will get cards toggle activated automatically if their Master Account got activated. Therefore, for XP Owned Accounts that are required to be KYC-ed by MO, we shall toggle off their cards toggle first.

Enstack XP Owned Additional Steps

No

Category

Steps

owner

1

AA

Enstack merchants will be requesting account activation thru their AM/SR or from Slack channel #ext-enstack-xendit-integration

SR/AM

2

AA

MO will proceed KYC for Enstack merchants in this tracker (MO Only) Shopboxo & Enstack Sub-merchants KYC [Restricted]

MO

3

Cards Activation

During or after MO proceeds for Enstack, MO should request for Mrisk to review the application.

On the tracker, MO can tick-marked the column I (“i”) and this will trigger automate notifications to #cc-settings-request and change the Cards Status (column G to be Pending Approval)

4

Once requests went to #cc-settings-request, Mrisk will review BAU

Mrisk

5

Once we got approval from Mrisk, MO to proceed with Cards Activation BAU using Maya (local cards only for Enstack)

6

Once cards is activated, please do not forget to update column G - Cards Status.

If there were instances where Cards is rejected, please kindly update the status in column G as well and inform the Sales (Ryan Garcia)

Individual Sellers (XP Owned Sub-Account)

  1. AM/SR raised the request to #cc-settings-request for Mrisk’s approval
  2. Once approved, Mrisk will enable cards and set rules/limits for merchants
  3. MO will proceed to add Maya MID for merchants BAU

XP-Managed Cards Activation

DragonPay Sub-Account

  1. XP-Account DragonPay will apply for cards activation from their own Dashboard. Their application will go to our CA Dashboard BAU
  2. DP AM/SR will update their tracker [Ext] Dragonpay x Xendit Credit Card Acquiring Referrals - Merchant Tracker - Sheet Channel Fees
  3. MO shall raise the request to #cc-settings-request for Mrisk’s approval
  4. Once approved, Mrisk will enable cards and set rules/limits for merchants
  5. MO will proceed to add Maya MID for merchants BAU and updates DP tracker in the Sheet Cards Activation Status

PJ Lhuillier / Perapal / Cebuana Sub-Account

Cards Activation for merchants with Social Media Page

As of Jan 27 2023

According to Mrisk, we can proceed to proceed activating cards for sub-merchant under Cebuana / Perapal / PJ Lhuillier provided that they passed the following checklist:

a). Is socmed url accessible?

b). url shows products/services that are aligned with merchant’s application

c). url shows pricing in local currency

d). If merchant provides a clear payment flow they intend to do with our cards product (e.g: are they sending invoice links to buyers, are they integrating via API?, etc). For point d) we will need you to help us get this information from merchant.

Once all passed, MO will request for approval from Mrisk and they will setup parameters back end before MO will activate cards.

Pending:

Currently getting confirmation in public channel if this will be applied for all ID and PH merchants https://xendit.slack.com/archives/C01PHK0ML79/p1674807938038739 "

    • Trx date:

    • Trx amount:
    • Masked card no:
    • Merchant Descriptor:
  • MO to send an email to the UBP team to ask for the reason for error and how to resolve the issue.

    Under MID, click DUPLICATE and use the info below:

BID : DEFAULT_XDT

MID label : UBP_CTV_ECOMM_USD_5999

and then save

  1. Then proceed with adding PHP MID:
  • For PHP MID, MO should check assigned MCC
  • MO will compare the rates for UBP vs Maya based on Partner Acquirer MCC Comparison to check which acquirer has the lower MDR rates for PHP
  • If Maya has lower rate, then proceed with duplicating Maya MID as well to merchant’s BID (the step will be similar with Adding Maya MID) - see below pic as example

  • If UBP has lower rate, then proceed with duplicating UBP MID as well to merchant’s BID with below steps:
    Fill with corresponding UBP MID that falls into the category. i.e if merchant industry is school, then add MID 5 XENDIT_UBP_PHP_5 (ref: Partner Acquirer MCC Comparison - Sheet UBP)

9

Update MCC in CM Dashboard

Click the pencil button on the top right corner.

Open Customer Management (CM), copy the BID from PH Cards onto CM.

Go to Business Settings > Cards > MCC, and add the MCC that we UBP has approved., copy the postal code and paste it onto the “Postal code” field in the PH Cards dashboard.

  4. Scroll to Cards section

NEW PROCESS: If activation was done via the channel approval tab in OM, it should be automated. But if it was done manually via Retool, MO needs to manually configure/add USD in Retool:

Go to Retool > Merchant

Search by BID

Scroll to USD, and add the following configuration:

To add USD MID (Old Process)

  2. Search by BID
  3. Go to Business Settings
  4. Scroll to Cards Section

and then save

  2. Click Save

Adding Recurring MID

  1. In case a merchant requested for recurring payments, MO needs to manually add in Active MID under Business Settings. For Maya MID, recurring is already enabled & make sure “Allow merchant initiated transactions” is enabled.
